selections.name: Dazzling Geisha
selections.reason: Class drop after contesting a $104k race last start. Placed on soft ground prior to that. Good barrier draw.

selections.name: Stylish Diamond
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start over 5.5f. Drawn well in barrier 4 and should be competitive.

selections.name: Sport
selections.reason: Placed 3rd last start on a soft track. Consistent form makes him a solid contender.

selections.name: The Barber
selections.reason: First starter who trialled well for 2nd on a soft track. Respect the debutant despite the wide draw.

danger_horse.name: Formal Affair
danger_horse.reason: Better than debut suggests and gets the inside draw to improve.

selections.name: Bonnie Bouquet
selections.reason: Solid Victorian form before arriving here. Fits well into this maiden field.

selections.name: Bowdene
selections.reason: Good debut 2nd back in November. Trialled well for return. Scratched from Race 1 to run here.

selections.name: Triple Spirit
selections.reason: Ex-Victorian with a good draw. Has shown enough to be competitive in this grade.

selections.name: Belvedere Miss
selections.reason: Consistent recent form with two 4th place finishes. Can sneak into the placings.

danger_horse.name: I Want It All
danger_horse.reason: Trialled well for 2nd and gets a good inside draw for debut.

selections.name: Leica Flamingo
selections.reason: Great form with a win and a 2nd in last two starts. Gets weight relief and a good draw.

selections.name: Scialla
selections.reason: Last start winner who looks progressive. Inside draw is a big advantage.

selections.name: Saraqael
selections.reason: Consistent performer who handles soft ground well. Top weight is a slight concern but has the class.

selections.name: Betterlucknexttime
selections.reason: Class drop and an inside draw should see a bounce back to better form.

danger_horse.name: Our Eagle Rock
danger_horse.reason: Solid 3rd last start and can feature if the pace is right.

selections.name: Smart Mission
selections.reason: Excellent form with a win and a 2nd. Barrier 1 is ideal and handles soft conditions perfectly.

selections.name: Bo Bo Beware
selections.reason: Consistent type who won two starts back. Good draw keeps him right in the mix.

selections.name: Replace The Ace
selections.reason: Won two starts back and remains a solid contender in this field.

selections.name: Kareem
selections.reason: Good 2nd last start and handles the distance well. Wide draw is the only slight negative.

danger_horse.name: San Juan
danger_horse.reason: Last start winner stepping up in class but racing with confidence.

selections.name: Neverenoughlego
selections.reason: Last start winner who looks highly progressive. Can overcome the wider draw.

selections.name: Ten Carat Lucy
selections.reason: Consistent mare who finished 2nd last start. Good draw gives her every chance.

selections.name: Rebelious Red
selections.reason: Solid 3rd last start and can figure in the finish with the right run.

selections.name: Marellity
selections.reason: Light weight and a good draw should see her improve on recent efforts.

danger_horse.name: Blitzwater
danger_horse.reason: Resuming with an inside draw. Watch betting for stable confidence.

selections.name: King Spirit
selections.reason: Class runner of the field. Good 2nd two starts back and drawn well to strike.

selections.name: Pretty Slick
selections.reason: Consistent mare who finished 2nd last start. Handles soft ground and scratched from Race 5 to run here.

selections.name: Universal Harmony
selections.reason: Resumes after a win last campaign. Good draw and should be ready to fire fresh.

selections.name: Been A Secret
selections.reason: Solid 2nd last start and carries a light weight. Wide draw is the main hurdle.

danger_horse.name: Electric Brae
danger_horse.reason: Inside draw and light weight make her a dangerous place prospect.

selections.name: Victory's Ghost
selections.reason: Last start winner who gets a good barrier and handles soft conditions well.

selections.name: Sujeed
selections.reason: Good 2nd last start and has been racing consistently. Strong contender.

selections.name: Outback Bandit
selections.reason: Last start winner in form. Top weight and wide draw make it tougher, but has the ability.

selections.name: All Business
selections.reason: Resumes after a win. Wide draw is a negative but has the class to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Determination
danger_horse.reason: Consistent form recently and can figure in the finish with a clean run.
